sql_array: CREATE TABLE months (id INTEGER, event_date TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO months (id, event_date) VALUES (1, TIMESTAMP '2023-01-15');
INSERT INTO months (id, event_date) VALUES (2, TIMESTAMP '2023-02-20');
SELECT id, monthname(event_date) AS month_name FROM months;
UPDATE months SET event_date = TIMESTAMP '2023-03-10' WHERE id = 1;
